# Proquoment Buyer Dashboard

> The Buyer Dashboard at buyer.proquoment.in is the sourcing workspace for international importers using Proquoment — an AI-powered B2B enabled procurement system helps global buyers to source from verified manufacturers.

Built with Next.js, Supabase realtime, and Sentry error monitoring.

## Pages

- [Home](https://buyer.proquoment.in/): Dashboard overview
- [Submit RFQ](https://buyer.proquoment.in/rfq): Submit sourcing requirements
- [Quotes](https://buyer.proquoment.in/quotes): View and compare supplier quotes
- [Orders](https://buyer.proquoment.in/orders): Track purchase orders and samples
- [Shipments](https://buyer.proquoment.in/shipments): Monitor freight and delivery
- [Products List](https://buyer.proquoment.in/products-list): Browse manufacturer catalog
- [Product Detail](https://buyer.proquoment.in/product-detail): View product specs and MOQ
- [New Product Request](https://buyer.proquoment.in/new-product): Request new sourcing categories
- [Messages](https://buyer.proquoment.in/messages): Chat with suppliers and admin
- [Organization](https://buyer.proquoment.in/organization): Company profile and team
- [Account](https://buyer.proquoment.in/account): Account settings

## Related

- [Proquoment Platform](https://proquoment.in)
- [Supplier Quotation Dashboard](https://supplier.proquoment.in)
- [Contact Proquoment](https://proquoment.in/contact)
